title: UAE announces Eid Al Adha Holiday for federal entities from 25 to 29 May
summary: The Day of Arafah and Eid Al Adha holiday for ministries and federal entities for the year 2026
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
PHOTO

The Federal Authority for Government Human Resources (FAHR) announced that the Day of Arafah and Eid Al Adha holiday for ministries and federal entities for the year 2026 will begin on Monday, 25th May, 2026, and continue until Friday, 29th May, 2026, with official work resuming on Monday, 1st June, 2026.

Article Source: Emirates News Agency (WAM)
